title: Wave 1 training source materials

tuw_evidence.title: Wave 1 screen flow source draft

Launch TUW workbook ledger integrity check

notes: This is an index draft only; the required walkthrough captures and rendered UI copy compliance check are not complete.
The index includes role-based TOCs plus prohibited actions, misfiling correction, and escalation guide sections.

The product-ui glossary exists and is linked, but LT-L4-W06 remains open because T02 screenshots, walkthrough material, final link check, rendered copy validation, and evidence package assembly are incomplete.

tuw_evidence.title: 핵심 업무 시나리오 워크스루를 캡처한다
tuw_evidence.objective: 핵심 업무 시나리오(신건 등록→문서 filing→이메일 filing→task/deadline→issue→audit 조회)의 단계별 화면 캡처·조작 설명이 교재 삽입 가능한 형태로 보존된다.
acceptance_criteria: 시나리오 단계 전부(≥6단계)에 캡처 이미지와 조작 캡션이 1:1로 존재한다(단계 수=캡처 수 판정).
캡처 전부가 합성 시드 데이터만 노출한다(실존 인명·사건명 0건 — 캡처 전수 점검 판정).

verification_contract.method: 수동검증: 1) 단계 수와 캡처 파일 수 대조 2) 캡처 전수에서 합성 시드 외 데이터 0건 점검 3) 캡션-화면 일치 표본 점검

tuw_evidence.blocked_reason: This TUW is represented for coverage only. Required deliverables and acceptance criteria remain blocked or pending until real evidence or owner-approved deferral coverage exists.
tuw_evidence.required_next_action: Provide real completion evidence for this TUW, or record valid owner-approved deferral coverage in docs/launch/launch-decision-register.md.
notes: No completion, production readiness, go-live approval, owner approval, or owner deferral is claimed by this coverage row.
Full Claude review remains waived by user instruction and is not valid review evidence.

blocked_claims: This record does not claim LT-L4-W06, LT-L4-W06-T01, or LT-L4-W06-T03 is complete.
This record does not prove rendered UI labels match the source flows.
This record does not capture screenshots or publish L7 training material.
This record does not count the user review waiver as a valid Claude review receipt.
